synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20924 Oracle Linux 9 NetworkManager-libreswan bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20924
description:
[1.2.27-2]
- Fix potentional crash in malformed imports

[1.2.27-1]
- Update to 1.2.27 version
- Add support for nm-auto-defaults + symetric import/export (RHEL-118843)
- Support leftsendcert in X.509-Based VPN (RHEL-110772)
- Support rightca in ipsec section
- Esp param properly exported

[1.2.26-3]
- Fix regression on phase2alg/esp for IKEv1 (RHEL-85768)

[1.2.26-2]
- Add support for nm-auto-defaults (RHEL-85768)

[1.2.26-1]
- Update to 1.2.26 release
- Add support for leftsubnets/rightsubnets (RHEL-56553)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20924

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20924.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
NetworkManager-libreswan-1.2.27-2.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
NetworkManager-libreswan-gnome-1.2.27-2.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
NetworkManager-libreswan-1.2.27-2.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
NetworkManager-libreswan-gnome-1.2.27-2.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/NetworkManager-libreswan-1.2.27-2.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:
[1.2.27-2]
- Fix potentional crash in malformed imports

[1.2.27-1]
- Update to 1.2.27 version
- Add support for nm-auto-defaults + symetric import/export (RHEL-118843)
- Support leftsendcert in X.509-Based VPN (RHEL-110772)
- Support rightca in ipsec section
- Esp param properly exported

[1.2.26-3]
- Fix regression on phase2alg/esp for IKEv1 (RHEL-85768)

[1.2.26-2]
- Add support for nm-auto-defaults (RHEL-85768)

[1.2.26-1]
- Update to 1.2.26 release
- Add support for leftsubnets/rightsubnets (RHEL-56553)
